steps.title: Use the filtering constraint
steps.content: The passage says larger whales engulf more water, but baleen surface area does not increase at the same rate. That explains why a longer whale would need more time to filter water than a shorter whale.

steps.title: Check the table comparison
steps.content: A is false because minke and humpback filter times differ. B focuses on lunges rather than filter time. D is false because blue whales do not have the highest average number of lunges per dive.

steps.title: Match length to filter time
steps.content: Fin whales are longer than minke whales and have a much longer average filter time, 31.30 seconds versus 8.88 seconds. The answer is C.
